characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Cowboy Cop: In the real world, his actions during investigations would get him arrested, demoted, and/or fired. Good Is Not Soft: In season 7,he strangles and almost kills a pedophile's brother to rescue a kidnapped girl. Limited Wardrobe: He always wore a black suit with a white shirt and black tie. The only real variation was the textures and patterns on his ties. Married to the Job: This is one of the two reasons why he ended up divorced in Season 3 (the other is sleeping with his co-worker Samantha) and losing custody of his two daughters. Only Known by Their Nickname: His real name is John Michael.

characters.name: Jack Malone
characters.description: Cowboy Cop: In the real world, his actions during investigations would get him arrested, demoted, and/or fired. Good Is Not Soft: In season 7,he strangles and almost kills a pedophile's brother to rescue a kidnapped girl. Limited Wardrobe: He always wore a black suit with a white shirt and black tie. The only real variation was the textures and patterns on his ties. Married to the Job: This is one of the two reasons why he ended up divorced in Season 3 (the other is sleeping with his co-worker Samantha) and losing custody of his two daughters. Only Known by Their Nickname: His real name is John Michael.

characters.name: Samantha Spade
characters.description: Time-Shifted Actor: In "Nickel and Dimed: Part 2," Sam is played by Aspen Payge and Sage Mears as a little girl and a teenager, respectively.

characters.name: Danny Taylor
characters.description: The Alcoholic: He is a recovering one. White Sheep: He's the only member of his family to not be screwed up.

characters.name: Martin Fitzgerald
characters.description: The Alcoholic: He develops a painkiller addiction after being shot. Dating Catwoman:He dates a criminal in the seventh season.It doesn't go well for his career. Did Not Get the Girl: He and Samantha finally get together in Season 3 after 2 years of attraction, but it fizzles when he finally gets fed up with her reluctance to advance the relationship, as well as suspecting that she's still in love with Jack. Despite most of their subsequent scenes strongly implying that they still care about each other, they never get back together. Even the Guys Want Him: Jack realizes that a suspect is gay when he notices him checking Martin out. New Meat: He joined the team in the Pilot episode.

characters.name: Elena Delgado
characters.description: Cowboy Cop: Elena isn't as bad as Jack in this regard, but she does have her moments such as when she got rough with a suspect who "gave her attitude" in her debut episode and when she held Carlos's partner at gunpoint in the episode where her daughter was kidnapped. Dirty Harriet: In her first episode, she poses as a call girl to get information from a suspect. In "Candy", she goes undercover as a stripper. Good Cop/Bad Cop: She tries this routine on a prostitute in "From The Ashes" with Sam serving as the good cop. Sam doesn't appreciate this tactic and tells Elena that such actions will not be tolerated by her. Sixth Ranger: She joins the team in season four as the sixth member. Jack brings her onboard because they are spread too thin. Survivor Guilt: In "Candy", she expresses sadness that she is alive to be with her daughter while the victim's son will grow up without his mother.

characters.name: Doris Malone
characters.description: Posthumous Character: Died long before the series began.

characters.name: Sofia Delgado
characters.description: Cousin Oliver: She's an even straighter example than her mother, even being theVictim of the Weekin one episode.
